stemHtml: In usual aviation definitions, which of the following correctly describes flight time?

options.a: From the moment the aircraft takes off.
options.b: Only the time when the aircraft is airborne.
options.c: From the moment all aircraft doors are closed and the aircraft starts moving for the purpose of flight until it comes to a complete stop after landing and doors are opened.
options.d: From brake release at take-off until touchdown.
